channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [STYL] Seshaasai Tech Q4FY26: Revenue Up 9.6% YoY, PAT Up 29.9%
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Seshaasai Technologies Ltd reported a strong Q4FY26 with revenue from operations at ₹4,041.76 million, a growth of 9.6% YoY. EBITDA stood at ₹1,244.95 million, up 22.8% YoY, with a margin of 30.8%. Profit After Tax (PAT) reached ₹817.87 million, a 29.9% YoY increase, resulting in a PAT margin of 20.2%. The Board has recommended a dividend of ₹2.50 per share. For FY26, revenue was ₹14,411.35 million, with an EBITDA margin of 27.4% and PAT of ₹2,400.1 million.

  • Q4FY26 revenue grew 9.6% YoY to ₹4,041.76 million.
  • Q4FY26 EBITDA increased 22.8% YoY to ₹1,244.95 million, margin at 30.8%.
  • Q4FY26 PAT rose 29.9% YoY to ₹817.87 million, margin at 20.2%.
  • FY26 EBITDA margin improved to 27.4%.
  • Board recommends a dividend of ₹2.50 per share for FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Seshaasai Technologies Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [LIPPISYS] Lippi Systems: Share Capital Increase & Preferential Issue
item.description:
Lippi Systems Ltd's board approved increasing authorized share capital from ₹10 Crore to ₹15 Crore and issuing 65,00,000 warrants convertible into equity shares on a preferential basis at ₹56.84 per warrant. The board also noted a Share Purchase Agreement leading to an Open Offer, and approved the draft notice for an Extra Ordinary General Meeting on June 14, 2026.

  • Authorized share capital increased to ₹15 Crore.
  • 65,00,000 warrants to be issued on preferential basis at ₹56.84 per warrant.
  • Share Purchase Agreement triggers Open Offer.
  • EGM scheduled for June 14, 2026.
  • CS ROOPAL PATEL appointed as scrutinizer for EGM.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LIPPI SYSTEMS LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [STYL] Seshaasai Tech FY26: Revenue ₹14,411.35 Mn, Dividend ₹2.50/Share
item.description:
Seshaasai Technologies Ltd (STYL) reported its FY26 results, with revenue from operations at ₹14,411.35 million, a marginal decline of 1.5% YoY. Q4FY26 revenue stood at ₹4,041.76 million, up 9.6% YoY. The company's Board has recommended a dividend of ₹2.50 per share (25%) for the year 2025-26. EBITDA for FY26 was ₹3,940.89 million with a margin of 27.4%, while Q4FY26 EBITDA stood at ₹1,244.95 million with a margin of 30.8%. Profit After Tax (PAT) for FY26 was ₹2,400.1 million.

  • Seshaasai Technologies' FY26 revenue declined 1.5% YoY to ₹14,411.35 million.
  • Q4FY26 revenue grew 9.6% YoY to ₹4,041.76 million.
  • The Board recommended a dividend of ₹2.50 per share (25%) for FY26.
  • FY26 EBITDA margin improved to 27.4%, up 204 bps YoY.
  • Q4FY26 EBITDA margin was 30.8%, up 330 bps YoY.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Seshaasai Technologies Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ONMOBILE] OnMobile Global FY26: Revenue from Operations at ₹1,801.6 Mn
item.description:
🔥 Trending

OnMobile Global Limited's board approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Key highlights include revenue from operations for mobile entertainment services at ₹1,801.6 million for FY26. The board also appointed Leo Matthew Olebe as an Additional Director (Independent Director) and re-appointed Ernst & Young LLP as Internal Auditors for FY 26-27.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved with unmodified audit opinion.
  • Leo Matthew Olebe appointed as an Additional Independent Director effective May 18, 2026.
  • Ernst & Young LLP re-appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 26-27.
  • Revenue from Operations for Mobile entertainment services at ₹1,801.60 million for FY26.
  • Net Loss for the period/year is ₹(35.49) million.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OnMobile Global Ltd. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [JSWCEMENT] JSW Cement Board Meeting on 21 May 2026 to Approve Results
item.description:
JSW Cement Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 21, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a dividend for the same period. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities has been closed from April 1, 2026, to May 23, 2026.

  • JSW Cement board meeting set for May 21, 2026.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 to be approved.
  • Dividend recommendation to be considered.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to May 23, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JSW Cement Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [WINDLAS*] Windlas Biotech: Labour Protest Causes Temporary Disruption
item.description:
Windlas Biotech Ltd. reported a temporary disruption in operations at certain manufacturing sites on May 18, 2026, due to a statewide labour unrest in Uttarakhand. Production was restored by the evening shift, and operations have resumed across all sites. The company does not anticipate any material impact on its operations, supply chain, or financial performance. Local authorities are working to restore normalcy, and the management is closely monitoring the situation.

  • Windlas Biotech experienced temporary operational disruption due to labour protests.
  • Production was restored by the evening shift on May 18, 2026.
  • Company does not expect material impact on operations or financials.
  • Local administration is working to restore normalcy.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Windlas Biotech Ltd | Category: Disruption

item.title: [LIPPISYS] Lippi Systems: Share Capital Increased to ₹15 Cr
item.description:
Lippi Systems Ltd has increased its Authorized Share Capital from ₹10,00,00,000 to ₹15,00,00,000 by creating an additional 5,00,00,000 Equity Shares with a face value of ₹10 each. The board also approved the issue of 65,00,000 warrants convertible into equity shares on a preferential basis at ₹56.84 per warrant, subject to shareholder approval. Additionally, the board noted a Share Purchase Agreement where existing promoters will sell 50.97% of the company's equity to a group of acquirers, triggering an open offer.

  • Authorized Share Capital increased to ₹15 Crores.
  • 65,00,000 warrants to be issued on preferential basis at ₹56.84 per warrant.
  • Valuation Report by M/s Procurve Valux Private Limited noted.
  • Open Offer triggered due to Share Purchase Agreement.
  • EGM to be held on June 14, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LIPPI SYSTEMS LTD.-$ | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [ONMOBILE] OnMobile Global FY26 Loss ₹35.49 Mn; Leo Olebe Appointed Director
item.description:
OnMobile Global Limited's board approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The company reported a loss of ₹35.49 million for the year. The board also appointed Leo Matthew Olebe as an Additional Director (Independent Director) for a five-year term, subject to shareholder approval. Additionally, M/s. Ernst & Young LLP were re-appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 26-27.

  • OnMobile Global reports a loss of ₹35.49 million for FY26.
  • Leo Matthew Olebe appointed as an Additional Independent Director.
  • Ernst & Young LLP re-appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 26-27.
  • Audited financial results approved as per IND-AS for FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OnMobile Global Ltd. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SYNGENE] Syngene: Voluntary Liquidation of SMSL Approved
item.description:
Syngene International Ltd's board approved the voluntary liquidation of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Syngene Manufacturing Solutions Limited (SMSL), as per the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016. SMSL, a non-material subsidiary with no business operations, will be liquidated as a solvent company, pending necessary approvals. The liquidation is not expected to affect Syngene's consolidated financials. SMSL's turnover was Nil, and its net worth was ₹93.97 Lakh as of March 31, 2026.

  • Syngene board approves voluntary liquidation of Syngene Manufacturing Solutions Limited (SMSL).
  • SMSL is a wholly-owned, non-material subsidiary with no business operations.
  • Liquidation is subject to approvals and will not materially impact Syngene's financials.
  • SMSL's net worth was ₹93.97 Lakh as of March 31, 2026.
  • The liquidation process will follow the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Syngene International Ltd | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [WARRENTEA] Warren Tea: Equity Shareholders Meeting on June 18, 2026
item.description:
Warren Tea Ltd. has announced a meeting of equity shareholders on June 18, 2026, at 11:30 AM, convened pursuant to an order of the NCLT. The meeting will be held virtually via video conferencing. The purpose is to discuss the scheme of amalgamation of Warren Tea with Maple Hotels & Resorts Limited. The notice, explanatory statement, and annexures were sent to shareholders on May 18, 2026, and are available on the company's website and the BSE website. E-voting will be available to shareholders.

  • Equity shareholders meeting scheduled for June 18, 2026, via video conference.
  • Meeting is convened pursuant to NCLT order for amalgamation scheme.
  • E-voting facility available for equity shareholders.
  • Notice and related documents sent to shareholders on May 18, 2026.
  • Cut-off date for e-voting eligibility is December 31, 2025.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WARREN TEA LTD.-$ | Category: Merger
